credentials.account: admin.m4j1@example.com -> accounting.m4j1@example.com (+ tenant-scoped super-admin role seed)

steps.action: POST /api/v1/accounting/journal-entries with balanced CASH/REV lines dated 2026-04-07 in April 2026 open period
steps.expected: HTTP 200 with a JournalEntryDto containing a non-null id, posted status, and balanced line items
steps.observed: HTTP 200; id=3 referenceNumber=JRN-UTM4J1-202604-0002 status=POSTED accountingPeriodStatus=OPEN with CASH debit 250.0 and REV credit 250.0

assertions.title: Journal reversal works in OPEN period

steps.expected: HTTP 200 with a reversing JournalEntryDto whose lines mirror the original entry
steps.observed: HTTP 200; reversal id=4 correctionType=REVERSAL reversalOfEntryId=3 with REV debit 250.0 and CASH credit 250.0

assertions.title: Journal reversal blocked in LOCKED period

steps.action: Create a March 2026 journal, submit a period-close request as tenant accounting, approve close as tenant admin, then POST /api/v1/accounting/journal-entries/5/reverse
steps.expected: HTTP 400/409 with an error indicating the period is locked and reversal is not permitted
steps.observed: request-close returned 200 PENDING, approve-close returned 200 status=CLOSED with lockedAt set, and reversal then returned HTTP 400 with message "Accounting period March 2026 is locked/closed; an admin one-hour posting exception is required for this document"

steps.expected: HTTP 200 with a PeriodCloseRequestDto in PENDING status
HTTP 200 with an AccountingPeriodDto in CLOSED status
steps.observed: HTTP 200; March 2026 transitioned to status=CLOSED with closedBy=admin.m4j1@example.com and lockedAt populated

steps.action: POST /api/v1/accounting/periods/10/reopen as tenant admin before any super-admin role grant
Seed ROLE_SUPER_ADMIN onto accounting.m4j1@example.com in the disposable tenant, re-authenticate, then POST /api/v1/accounting/periods/11/reopen
steps.expected: A tenant-scoped super-admin can reopen the closed period
steps.observed: HTTP 200; March 2026 transitioned back to status=OPEN with reopenReason="Reopen for corrections"

steps.expected: HTTP 200 with MonthEndChecklistDto items for bank reconciliation, inventory count, and notes

steps.action: POST /api/v1/accounting/month-end/checklist/10 with bankReconciled=true, inventoryCounted=true, note="M4 runtime checklist"

issues.reason: Checklist endpoints reject the request with Invalid option 'PENDING' instead of returning/updating MonthEndChecklistDto.

frictions.description: Period-close approval enforces maker-checker separation and rejects same-actor approval attempts.
frictions.resolution: Created a tenant ACCOUNTING user through POST /api/v1/admin/users, rotated its emailed temporary password, submitted request-close with that user, and approved close with the tenant admin.

frictions.description: The platform-scoped validation.superadmin@example.com token is denied on tenant business routes with SUPER_ADMIN_PLATFORM_ONLY even though /accounting/periods/{id}/reopen is an allowed super-admin control path.
frictions.resolution: Seeded ROLE_SUPER_ADMIN onto a tenant-scoped validation user and retried reopen within the tenant auth scope, which returned HTTP 200 and reopened the period.

blockers.description: The month-end checklist endpoints fail with HTTP 400 Invalid option 'PENDING' on a fresh M4 tenant, so the checklist DTO cannot be read or updated through the user surface.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried both GET and POST against the fresh UTM4J1 tenant after normal authentication and X-Company-Code binding; both returned the same 400 validation error.

summary: Tested 6 runtime journal/period assertions on fresh tenant UTM4J1: 5 passed and 1 failed because the month-end checklist endpoints consistently returned HTTP 400 Invalid option 'PENDING'.
